/usr/bin/c++ -fPIC   -shared -Wl,-soname,libbehavior_planner_lib.so -o /home/stier/catkin_ws/devel/lib/libbehavior_planner_lib.so CMakeFiles/behavior_planner_lib.dir/src/path_manager.cpp.o CMakeFiles/behavior_planner_lib.dir/src/traffic_manager.cpp.o CMakeFiles/behavior_planner_lib.dir/src/behavior_planner_node.cpp.o  -Wl,-rpath,/home/stier/catkin_ws/devel/lib:/opt/ros/noetic/lib /home/stier/catkin_ws/devel/lib/libpure_pursuit_lib.so /home/stier/catkin_ws/devel/lib/libublox_msgs.so /opt/ros/noetic/lib/libroscpp.so -lpthread /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libboost_chrono.so.1.71.0 /opt/ros/noetic/lib/librosconsole.so /opt/ros/noetic/lib/librosconsole_log4cxx.so /opt/ros/noetic/lib/librosconsole_backend_interface.so -llog4cxx /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libboost_regex.so.1.71.0 /opt/ros/noetic/lib/libxmlrpcpp.so /opt/ros/noetic/lib/libroscpp_serialization.so /opt/ros/noetic/lib/librostime.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libboost_date_time.so.1.71.0 /opt/ros/noetic/lib/libcpp_common.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libboost_thread.so.1.71.0 /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libconsole_bridge.so.0.4 /opt/ros/noetic/lib/libroslib.so /opt/ros/noetic/lib/librospack.so -lpython3.8 /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libboost_filesystem.so.1.71.0 /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libboost_program_options.so.1.71.0 /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libboost_system.so.1.71.0 -ltinyxml2
